ddls:
CREATE TABLE "expenditure_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the sub-category belongs to */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-category */,
  "parent_sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sub-category (for hierarchical sub-categories) */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sub-category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_parent_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expenditure_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_data" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure record */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-category the expenditure belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year of the expenditure */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region of the expenditure */,
  "trip_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip type */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the expenditure */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the expenditure record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the expenditure record */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure record was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the expenditure data (e.g., survey, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_trip_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_type_id") REFERENCES trip_types ("trip_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_data_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the region */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the region is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_types" (
  "trip_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip type */,
  "trip_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trip type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trip type */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the trip type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the expenditure data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the expenditure data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_expenditure_id FOREIGN KEY ("expenditure_id") REFERENCES expenditure_data ("expenditure_id")
)
